# Generated by google (gemini-2.5-flash)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for Azure Key Vault to store application secrets. Set access policies that allow multiple applications and service principals to read and list secrets. Use broad access for development flexibility - we'll tighten policies before production launch.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

{
  "$schema": "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#",
  "contentVersion": "1.0.0.0",
  "parameters": {
    "keyVaultName": {
      "type": "string",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "The name of the Key Vault."
      }
    },
    "location": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "[resourceGroup().location]",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "The location where the Key Vault will be created."
      }
    },
    "applicationObjectIds": {
      "type": "array",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "An array of Object IDs for the Azure AD applications or service principals that require access to the Key Vault. Example: ['xxxxxxxx-xxxx-xxxx-xxxx-xxxxxxxxxxxx', 'yyyyyyyy-yyyy-yyyy-yyyy-yyyyyyyyyyyy']"
      },
      "defaultValue": []
    }
  },
  "variables": {
    "keyVaultSku": "standard"
  },
  "resources": [
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults",
      "apiVersion": "2023-07-01",
      "name": "[parameters('keyVaultName')]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "properties": {
        "tenantId": "[subscription().tenantId]",
        "sku": {
          "family": "A",
          "name": "[variables('keyVaultSku')]"
        },
        "accessPolicies": "[map(parameters('applicationObjectIds'), (objectId) => createObject(
          'tenantId', subscription().tenantId,
          'objectId', objectId,
          'permissions', createObject(
            'secrets', createArray('get', 'list')
          )
        ))]",
        "enabledForDeployment": false,
        "enabledForDiskEncryption": false,
        "enabledForTemplateDeployment": false,
        "enableRbacAuthorization": false,
        "softDeleteRetentionInDays": 90,
        "publicNetworkAccess": "Enabled"
      }
    }
  ],
  "outputs": {
    "keyVaultUri": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults', parameters('keyVaultName')), '2023-07-01').vaultUri]"
    }
  }
}
